name: Framework Route Detection
description: Auto-detects web framework types (Astro, Next.js, SvelteKit) from project root directories and extracts URL routes from their file-based routing conventions. Converts filesystem paths to URL patterns with support for dynamic segments.

functions.name: _path_to_route
functions.description: Convert a file path under a pages directory to a URL route. Strips file extensions, converts 'index' to root, and transforms dynamic segments ([param] -> :param, [...rest] -> *rest).

inputs.name: filepath
inputs.description: File path to convert to route

inputs.name: pages_dir
inputs.description: Base pages directory for relative path calculation

inputs.name: strip_extensions
inputs.description: File extensions to strip from the final path segment

error_cases.name: ValueError
error_cases.condition: filepath is not relative to pages_dir

preconditions: filepath must be relative to or under pages_dir for relative_to() to succeed
postconditions: Returns a route string starting with '/'
File extensions in strip_extensions are removed from the last path component
Path segments named 'index' at the end are removed
Dynamic segments [param] are converted to :param
Catch-all segments [...rest] are converted to *rest

functions.name: detect_astro
functions.description: Detect routes from an Astro project by scanning src/pages/** for .astro, .md, .mdx, .html files. Also checks web/src/pages for monorepo patterns.

inputs.name: project_root
inputs.description: Root directory of the Astro project

postconditions: Returns sorted list of unique route strings
Returns empty list if src/pages and web/src/pages directories don't exist
All returned routes start with '/'
Routes are deduplicated via set conversion
side_effects: Reads filesystem to check directory existence (is_dir)
Recursively scans directories for files matching extensions

functions.name: detect_nextjs
functions.description: Detect routes from a Next.js project supporting both App Router (app/**/page.{tsx,jsx,ts,js}) and Pages Router (pages/**/*.{tsx,jsx,ts,js}). Excludes files starting with underscore in Pages Router.

inputs.name: project_root
inputs.description: Root directory of the Next.js project

postconditions: Returns sorted list of unique route strings
Returns empty list if neither app/ nor pages/ directories exist
All returned routes start with '/'
Routes are deduplicated via set conversion
Files starting with _ in pages/ are excluded
side_effects: Reads filesystem to check directory existence (is_dir)
Recursively scans app/ for page.{tsx,jsx,ts,js} files

structured_side_effects.description: Scans for Next.js page files in app and pages directories

functions.name: detect_sveltekit
functions.description: Detect routes from a SvelteKit project by scanning src/routes/**/ for +page.svelte files.

inputs.name: project_root
inputs.description: Root directory of the SvelteKit project

postconditions: Returns sorted list of unique route strings
Returns empty list if src/routes directory doesn't exist
All returned routes start with '/'
Routes are deduplicated via set conversion
side_effects: Reads filesystem to check directory existence (is_dir)

functions.name: detect_framework
functions.description: Auto-detect web framework type from project root by checking for framework-specific config files, then extract routes. Checks in order: Astro (astro.config.*), Next.js (next.config.*), SvelteKit (svelte.config.*).

inputs.name: project_root
inputs.description: Root directory of the web project

postconditions: Returns (framework_name, routes) tuple
framework_name is 'astro', 'nextjs', 'sveltekit', or None
If framework detected, routes are extracted using corresponding detector function
If no framework detected, returns (None, [])
Detection order: Astro -> Next.js -> SvelteKit
Also checks web/astro.config.* for monorepo Astro projects
side_effects: Reads filesystem to glob for config files
Delegates to framework-specific detector which performs additional filesystem reads

invariants: All route lists are sorted and deduplicated
Framework detection is order-dependent: Astro, Next.js, SvelteKit

data_access.rationale: Module performs read-only filesystem scanning to detect project structure and extract routes

side_effects.rationale: Scans directories and files to detect framework type and extract routing information
